name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that suggests code completions, entire functions, and boilerplate directly in your editor. Powered by OpenAI Codex and trained on billions of lines of public code.
features: Real-time code suggestions in VS Code, JetBrains, and Neovim
Multi-language support including Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, and more
Chat interface for code explanations and refactoring
Context-aware completions using open files and project structure
Pull request summaries and code review assistance

name: Cursor
description: An AI-first code editor built on top of VS Code that deeply integrates AI assistance into every aspect of the coding workflow. Supports natural language editing and codebase-wide Q&A.
features: AI-powered code editor built on VS Code
Codebase-wide context understanding for accurate suggestions
Natural language code editing and generation
Inline chat and diff-based code review

name: Codeium
description: Free AI-powered code acceleration toolkit that provides autocomplete, search, and chat capabilities. Supports over 70 programming languages across 40+ editors.
features: Works in 40+ editors including VS Code, JetBrains, and Vim
In-editor AI chat for code explanations
Fast inference with low latency suggestions

name: Tabnine
description: AI code assistant that runs locally or in the cloud, offering privacy-focused code completions. Supports whole-line and full-function completions with team learning capabilities.
features: Local and cloud-based AI models for privacy control
Team learning from your codebase patterns
Support for all major IDEs and editors

name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's conversational AI assistant capable of generating text, answering questions, writing code, and assisting with a wide range of tasks through natural language interaction.
features: Natural language conversation with context retention

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant known for nuanced understanding, long-context processing, and thoughtful responses. Excels at analysis, coding, math, and creative writing tasks.
features: 200K token context window for long document analysis
Code generation and debugging across languages
Artifact creation for documents and code

name: Gemini
description: Google's multimodal AI model that can understand and generate text, code, images, and audio. Integrated across Google products with access to real-time information.
features: Multimodal understanding of text, images, and code
Real-time access to Google Search information

name: Perplexity
description: AI-powered answer engine that provides cited, up-to-date answers by searching the internet in real-time. Combines the power of LLMs with live web search for accurate responses.
features: Real-time web search with cited sources

name: Midjourney
description: Leading AI image generation tool that creates stunning, artistic images from text prompts. Known for its distinctive aesthetic quality and creative capabilities via Discord.
features: High-quality artistic image generation from text prompts
Style variation and blending between images

name: DALL-E
description: OpenAI's image generation model that creates realistic and creative images from natural language descriptions. Integrated into ChatGPT and available via API.
features: Photorealistic image generation from text descriptions
Inpainting and outpainting for image editing
Integrated into ChatGPT for conversational creation
API access for programmatic image generation

name: Canva AI
description: AI-powered design features built into Canva's popular graphic design platform. Generate images, remove backgrounds, write copy, and create presentations with AI assistance.
features: Magic Design for automatic layout generation
Brand kit consistency with AI suggestions

name: Figma AI
description: AI features integrated into Figma's collaborative design tool. Auto-generate designs, rename layers intelligently, and get AI-powered suggestions for UI components.
features: Collaborative real-time design with AI assist

name: Notion AI
description: AI writing and knowledge assistant built into Notion's all-in-one workspace. Summarize notes, generate content, brainstorm ideas, and translate text directly within your documents.
features: AI writing assistance within Notion documents
Q&A across your entire Notion workspace

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting assistant that provides real-time transcription, automated meeting notes, and action item extraction. Integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams.
features: Automated meeting summary and action items
Integration with Zoom, Meet, and Teams

name: Gamma
description: AI-powered presentation and document creation tool that generates beautiful slides, docs, and webpages from simple prompts. No design skills required.
features: Generate complete presentations from text prompts
Embedded media, charts, and interactive elements
Export to PDF and PowerPoint formats

name: Tome
description: AI-native storytelling and presentation platform that generates narratives, layouts, and visuals from your ideas. Designed for fast creation of polished presentations.

name: Semantic Scholar
description: AI-powered academic search engine by the Allen Institute for AI. Finds relevant research papers, extracts key insights, and provides citation context for faster literature review.
features: Author and topic pages for exploration

name: Connected Papers
description: Visual tool for discovering and exploring academic papers related to a field of work. Creates interactive graphs showing how papers are connected through citations and references.
features: Visual graph of related research papers
No account required for basic usage

name: Elicit
description: AI research assistant that helps find, summarize, and extract data from academic papers. Uses language models to automate research workflows and systematic reviews.

name: Consensus
description: AI search engine that finds and synthesizes answers from scientific research papers. Provides evidence-based answers with direct links to peer-reviewed sources.

name: GitHub Actions
description: GitHub's built-in CI/CD and automation platform that lets you build, test, and deploy code directly from your repositories. Offers thousands of community-created workflow actions.
features: Automated CI/CD pipelines from GitHub repos

name: Vercel
description: Frontend cloud platform for deploying web applications with zero configuration. Offers serverless functions, edge computing, and seamless integration with Next.js and other frameworks.
features: Preview deployments for every pull request

name: Hugging Face
description: The leading open-source AI community platform hosting thousands of pre-trained models, datasets, and Spaces for ML demos. The go-to hub for NLP, computer vision, and generative AI.
features: Datasets library with thousands of datasets
Spaces for hosting ML demos and apps

name: Kaggle
description: Google's data science and machine learning community platform offering competitions, free GPU notebooks, datasets, and learning courses. The world's largest ML competition platform.
features: ML competitions with real-world problems and prizes
Free GPU and TPU Jupyter notebooks
Community discussion forums and code sharing
